name: io.github.maxtechera/hushdrop
description: Open-source artifact sharing — publish HTML, Markdown, or files as branded, password-protected (zero-knowledge AES-256) links on your own domain, from any AI agent. The open-source, self-hosted alternative to Stacktree.

environment_variables.name: BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Vercel Blob token for self-hosting on your own domain. Optional — the managed (anonymous) and hosted tiers work without it.
